## Summary

Describe the change and the user-facing impact.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated where needed
- [ ] Docs updated where needed
- [ ] `ruff check server/` passes locally
- [ ] `ruff format --check server/` passes locally
- [ ] `cd server && pytest` passes locally
- [ ] Tested on the intended OS or runtime

## Validation

List the commands or manual checks you ran.

## Notes For Reviewers

Anything that needs extra attention during review.
